name: RtCW Multiplayer (Wolffiles)
author: hosting@wolffiles.eu
description: Return to Castle Wolfenstein Multiplayer dedicated server. Supports OSP mod.
startup: ./wolfded.x86 +set dedicated 2 +set net_port {{SERVER_PORT}} +set sv_maxclients {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +set fs_game {{MOD}} +set g_password "{{SERVER_PASSWORD}}" +set rconPassword "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}" +set sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}" +map {{MAP}} +exec {{CONFIG_FILE}} +set com_hunkmegs {{HUNK_MEGS}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt update
apt install -y curl unzip ca-certificates lib32gcc-s1 lib32stdc++6 2>/dev/null || true

cd /mnt/server

echo "========================================"
echo " Wolffiles.eu RtCW Server Installer"
echo "========================================"

## Download RtCW dedicated server
if [ ! -f "wolfded.x86" ]; then
    echo "Downloading RtCW MP server files..."
    curl -sSL -o rtcw-server.zip "https://filebase.trackbase.net/rtcw/full/rtcw-dedicated-linux.zip" || {
        curl -sSL -o rtcw-server.zip "https://wolffiles.eu/downloads/rtcw-dedicated-linux.zip" || {
            echo "WARNING: Could not download RtCW files. Manual upload required."
        }
    }
    
    if [ -f rtcw-server.zip ]; then
        unzip -o rtcw-server.zip
        rm -f rtcw-server.zip
    fi
fi

chmod +x wolfded.x86 2>/dev/null || true

mkdir -p main
mkdir -p logs

## Default config
if [ ! -f "main/server.cfg" ]; then
    cat > main/server.cfg << 'CFG'
// Wolffiles.eu RtCW Server Config
set sv_hostname      "RtCW - Wolffiles.eu"
set sv_maxclients    16
set g_gametype       5
set timelimit        20
set sv_maxRate       25000
set sv_allowDownload 1
set g_log            "logs/wolfded.log"
CFG
fi

echo "========================================"
echo " RtCW Installation complete!"
echo "========================================"
